Records.description: Two-loop massless five-point triangle-box, integral originally computed in Chicherin et al. 1809.06240. This paper derives 156 genealogical constraints on sequential discontinuities through weight seven, with 31 further empirical constraints unexplained.

Records.authors: Bargiela, Piotr, Frellesvig, Hjalte, Marzucca, Robin, Morales, Roger, Seefeld, Florian, Wilhelm, Matthias, Yang, Tong-Zhi
Records.description: $I_{3,1,2}$ two-loop topology with three internal paths of lengths a=3, b=1, c=2 (both v_L and v_R carry external legs); 5-point integral, planar (b=1). Geometry: 2 ISPs; at least elliptic; refer to special-case discussions in §4
